# Bruna Gomes

> Senior Product Manager with 6 years of experience scaling B2B and B2C digital products. Specialized in e-commerce, checkout and payments across LatAm (Brazil & Colombia), focused on conversion, revenue and App-First culture.

## About
- Name: Bruna Gomes
- Role: Senior Product Manager — E-commerce, Checkout & Payments, LatAm
- Location: São Paulo, Brazil
- Current company: Dafiti Group (Nov 2022 – present)
- Email: bruggomes79@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bruna-gomes-product-manager
- Website: https://brunagomes12.github.io/

## Selected impact
- Led the new Flutter checkout and PIX integration at Dafiti: double-digit conversion growth and a strong lift in revenue per session.
- Architected a real-time anti-fraud provider rollback during Black Friday, preventing millions in financial losses.
- Led the root-cause fix of legacy order-creation failures, stopping millions in losses per semester.
- Lead App-First evangelist: research, MVP and migration of native journeys to Flutter.

## Experience
- Dafiti Group — Senior Product Manager (Nov 2022–present) and Product Manager (Aug 2021–Dec 2022)
- BEYOND Soluções — Product Manager (2021)
- dti digital — Product Manager (2020–2021)
- Agência Zetta — Product Owner & Software Developer (2019–2020)
- UFLA (Android research), Comp Júnior (Business Director), Google Developers Group — earlier roles (2017–2019)

## Education
- Cursos PM3 — Product Manager (2022)
- Universidade Federal de Lavras — BSc in Information Systems (2014–2020)

## Skills
Product Management, E-commerce, Checkout, Payments, PIX, Growth & Experimentation, Legacy modernization, App-First, Discovery, Agile/Scrum, Product metrics.
